title: Scale NATS to 3-node cluster and enable JetStream persistence
subtasks: Update NATS deployment to run 3 replicas for high availability.
Configure NATS cluster mode with proper cluster name and peer discovery.
Enable JetStream persistence for message durability.
Set up persistent volume claims for JetStream storage.
Test failover and message delivery across all cluster nodes.

title: Harden NATS networking and security for production
subtasks: Issue TLS certificates for NATS endpoints using cert-manager (Let's Encrypt or internal CA).
Configure NATS to require TLS for all client and cluster connections.
Restrict NATS service access via Kubernetes NetworkPolicies to only allow traffic from authorized namespaces.
Update NATS service to use ClusterIP and expose via Ingress if external access is required.
Document NATS endpoint URLs and credentials for application teams.

title: Configure ingress controller and CDN for static assets
subtasks: Review and harden NGINX or Envoy ingress controller configuration for production (enable HTTP/2, set secure headers, rate limiting).
Integrate cert-manager for automatic TLS certificate provisioning on all ingress routes.
Configure Cloudflare CDN for static asset caching and DDoS protection.
Set up appropriate DNS records for production domains pointing to ingress controller.
Test end-to-end HTTPS access and CDN cache behavior for static assets.

title: Enforce Kubernetes network policies for pod-to-pod traffic isolation
subtasks: Define and apply CiliumNetworkPolicy resources to restrict pod-to-pod communication to only necessary flows.
Block all ingress and egress traffic by default, then explicitly allow required service-to-service paths (e.g., app to NATS).
Test network policy enforcement by attempting unauthorized connections between pods.
Document allowed network flows for audit and compliance.

title: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector with production sampling and Jaeger persistence
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector with production-appropriate sampling rates (e.g., 1-10%).
Configure exporters to send traces to Jaeger backend.
Provision persistent storage for Jaeger (e.g., PVCs or external storage) to retain traces.
Set up resource limits and autoscaling for OpenTelemetry Collector.
Verify trace ingestion, persistence, and query in Jaeger UI.

title: Define alert rules for SLO violations and critical infrastructure events
subtasks: Define Prometheus alert rules for NATS cluster health (e.g., node down, JetStream lag).
Set up alerts for ingress controller errors and certificate expiration.
Configure alerts for network policy violations or denied connections.
Integrate alerting with preferred notification channels (Slack, email, PagerDuty).
Test alert firing and notification delivery.
